docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIAN, HE

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED MAY-18-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARRETSON, BRUCE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TIAN, HE AS TO DEFENDANT GARRETSON, BRUCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO AUG-04-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HE TIAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRUCE GARRETSON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $375.59 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF VIA ZELLE TENDERED IN OPEN COURT. THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
